summary: Implemented the ADR 0189 governed network-impairment matrix on the live Windmill worker, repaired the shared repo-checkout packaging regression that had been breaking seeded Python jobs, and verified the staging matrix slice end to end through the Windmill API and the mirrored worker checkout.

verification.check: Focused ADR 0189 validation and repo automation gates
verification.observed: `python3 -m py_compile config/windmill/scripts/network-impairment-matrix.py scripts/network_impairment_matrix.py platform/faults/network_impairment_matrix.py`, `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_network_impairment_matrix.py tests/test_network_impairment_matrix_repo_surfaces.py tests/test_network_impairment_matrix_windmill.py -q` (`11 passed`), `make syntax-check-windmill`, `uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/workflow_catalog.py --validate`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, and `make pre-push-gate` all completed successfully from the isolated worktree.

`make validate` still stops on pre-existing unrelated `ansible-lint` warnings outside the ADR 0189 surface, including existing warnings under `control_plane_recovery`, `openbao_runtime`, and other shared roles; no ADR 0189-specific validation failures surfaced in that broader sweep.

verification.check: Windmill script publication and shared job-loader recovery
verification.observed: `GET /api/w/lv3/scripts/get/p/f%2Flv3%2Fnetwork-impairment-matrix` returned HTTP 200 with hash `65063c8a80599a06`, and after replaying `make live-apply-service service=windmill env=production EXTRA_ARGS='-e bypass_promotion=true'` the older `fault-injection` script also returned `status: planned` again through `POST /api/w/lv3/jobs/run_wait_result/p/f%2Flv3%2Ffault-injection` in `dry_run` mode, confirming the stale worker-checkout packaging metadata regression was cleared.

`POST /api/w/lv3/jobs/run_wait_result/p/f%2Flv3%2Fnetwork-impairment-matrix` with `{"target_class":"staging"}` returned `status: planned`, `entry_count: 4`, and `report_file: /srv/platform_server/.local/network-impairment-matrix/latest.json`; a guest-local read of that JSON file on `docker-runtime-lv3` returned the same `planned` staging slice.

notes: This workstream branch intentionally leaves `VERSION`, numbered release sections in `changelog.md`, `versions/stack.yaml`, and the top-level integrated `README.md` status summary for the final merge-to-main integration step.

The live repair added a shared Windmill runtime safeguard that removes stale `/srv/platform_server/pyproject.toml` and `lv3_platform_cli.egg-info` from the mirrored worker checkout so repo-managed Python jobs no longer trigger `uv` editable-build startup failures before their wrappers run.

The ADR 0189 rollout remains on the safe diagnostic path only: it renders governed staging, preview, fixture, standby, and recovery matrix slices but does not authorize ad hoc production impairments; actual higher-fidelity execution lanes remain follow-up work under ADR 0088 and ADR 0185.
